_comment: B-U8/U22 fixture — the EXACT field vocabulary 06-ghl-install-pages/tools/cc_board.py::ingest_task() emits on the wire when it carries producer personas (proven on the ONB side by tests/test_cc_rail_contract.py::TestB_U7IngestPersonaParity).
